topics.title: Media Misrepresentation of Sirius Satellite Radio Transition
topics.summary: The studio discusses how Newsweek and other media outlets stripped context from a joke about fans being "cheap bastards" to portray the transition to satellite radio as a failure.

topics.title: Caller Interview on Same-Sex Relationships

topics.title: Mental Health and Media Career Transitions
topics.summary: The studio discusses the mental health struggles of an individual in a facility, the upcoming performance of a finger-snapping entertainer, and the contract negotiations for Katie Couric and Meredith Vieira.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Media Commentary
